queries.question: Show all newspapers and magazines with a 20k circulation.
queries.sql:
SELECT Periodicals.name 
FROM Periodicals
WHERE (Periodicals.type = "Newspaper" OR Periodicals.type = "Magazine") AND Periodicals.circulation_numbers = 20000
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?periodicals a :Periodicals .
  ?periodicals p:name ?name .
  ?periodicals p:type ?type_w .
  ?periodicals p:type ?type_w2 .
  ?periodicals p:circulation_numbers ?circulation_numbers_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Newspaper" || STR(?type_w2) = "Magazine")) && (STR(?circulation_numbers_w) = "20000" || STR(?circulation_numbers_w) = "20000.0")))
}
